title: Idhayathai Kanavillai Song Lyrics Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven
stanzas: <div>Idhayathai Kanavillai Song Lyrics Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven

Vaanil irundhu vaanavil
ondru mannil irangi
vanthathuvo..

mangai avalathu
manhira kangal
chandhirar sooriyar
aanadhuvo..

kandaen azhagiya
kolusu kolusu
thirugaani aanathu
manasu mansu

innaal anubavam
pudhusu pudhusu
aval paadhak
kolusoli kaetkum podhu

idhayathai kaanavillai
athu tholainthum naan
thaedavillai

Chittu kuruviyin
siragai vaangi ada
parakkanum pola irukku

vetti kizhiyin kaalgal
vaangi ada kuthikkanum
pola irukku

kodi jenmam vazhnthen
innaale idhu unmaithaane

idhayathai kaanavillai
athu tholainthum naan
thaedavillai

pournami nilavai
miga aruginil paarthen
paravasa kadalil
naan padagai aanen

dhevathai kanni
iru thoondilai paarthen
maattiya meenai
naan aanen aanen.

pallam uligal koodi
sethukkiya silai thaanaa
bramman silaiyai paarthu
jeevanai koduthaanaa
theendaamal thiruda
sonnaanaa ennai indru

idhayathai kaanavillai
athu tholainthum naan
thaedavillai

Porumaiyin thooram
iru kadhal kaditham.
avalukku ezhuthi
naan anjal serppen.
ennudan muzhuthum
naan udhadugal kaetpen

sorgathil ennai pootti
saaviyai tholaithaale
pookalai thottilil potu
laaligal padithaale
paathai meethu
poovaai poothaale
ennil indru

idhayathai kaanavillai
athu tholainthum naan
thaedavillai

Chittu kuruviyin
siragai vaangi ada
parakkanum pola irukku

vetti kizhiyin kaalgal
vaangi ada kuthikkanum
pola irukku

kodi jenmam vazhnthen
innaale idhu unmaithaane

idhayathai kaanavillai
athu tholainthum naan
thaedavillai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings of the protagonist towards their beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 25, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhayathai Kanavillai, the protagonist expresses their deep love and yearning through heartfelt lyrics and a soothing melody. The song encapsulates the emotions of romance and melancholy, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments in the film. With Hariharan's soulful rendition, listeners are taken on an emotional journey that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. This song beautifully conveys the essence of longing and affection, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhayathai Kanavillai is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Hariharan's soulful voice and S.A. Rajkumar's enchanting composition, this song transports listeners to a world of romance and emotion. Experience the magic of Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven and let the heartfelt lyrics resonate with your soul.
stanzaMeanings: Did it come down from the sky to the earth?
Is she the one with beautiful eyes like the moon and sun?
I see beautiful anklets, but her heart is restless.
Yesterday, I had a new experience when she asked about her anklet.
I cannot see the heart, even if it is lost, I cannot find it.
It feels like I need to catch a small bird's wings.
It feels like I need to catch the legs of a fish.
I lived a life of struggle, and today this is the truth.
I cannot see the heart, even if it is lost, I cannot find it.
I saw the full moon very close and became a wave in the ocean.
I saw the goddess and became a fish that was caught.
Did the statue that brought the worlds together give life to the Brahma statue?
I cannot see the heart, even if it is lost, I cannot find it.
In the distance of patience, there is a love letter. I will write it for her. I will ask for everything from her.
If I am taken to heaven and lose my life, flowers will bloom in the cradle and the path will be filled with flowers today.
I cannot see the heart, even if it is lost, I cannot find it.
It feels like I need to catch a small bird's wings.
It feels like I need to catch the legs of a fish.
I lived a life of struggle, and today this is the truth.
I cannot see the heart, even if it is lost, I cannot find it.
